title: neottia spiralis
intro: Neottia spiralis, also known as the Twisted Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid native to Asia and North America, characterized by its slender stems and twisted, spiral flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottia spiralis include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Neottia spiralis can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
